title: PhD
biography: Michael Rosbash is an American geneticist who discovered the transcription-translation feedback loop underlying circadian rhythm. Nobel Prize 2017.
aiSummary: Michael Rosbash is a genetics specialist at Brandeis University. Based in Waltham.

affiliations.role: Peter Gruber Endowed Chair in Neuroscience
